payload.long_description: Wall-mounted analog clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hands set in a scalloped dark glossy metal or plastic frame; full clock is visible but image is slightly blurred/low resolution, estimated diameter ~0.3–0.35 m and approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
